mainEntity.name: How long do Utah chemical exposure claims take to settle?
mainEntity.text: How long do Utah chemical exposure claims take to settle?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-12 months for simple; 1-3 years for litigated cancer/neuro claims with appeals.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray timeline: 90 days initial decision, 6 months hearing. Delays from IMEs. Settle fast for cashflow or litigate for max. Insurers lowball—attorneys push 2x offers. Track via portal.

name: Timeline for Utah Chemical Exposure Workers' Comp Settlements
description: 3-12 months for simple; 1-3 years for litigated cancer/neuro claims with appeals.
